description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in white from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the high shine leather effect fabric and sporty style will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 30cmWidth: 37cmDepth: 12cmMade of synthetic leather for durability and high gloss shineHas one large main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pockets and organiser pouchesTwo short handles attached to the bag with decorative buckles and an alternate long strapZip pocket on front with decorative stripe embellishment and one zip pocket on backCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
